headline: Costco tackles major frustration for members
summary: Costco members understand that they're trading certain frills like fancy floor displays, grocery bags, and in-store directories for lower prices. In recent years, however, Costco has been investing in technology to improve the in-store shopping experience. Those changes have been careful ...

headline: How Investors May Respond To Costco (COST) Digital Momentum Amid Valuation Jitters And Macro Uncertainty
summary: In May 2026, Costco Wholesale reported robust operational momentum, with net sales rising and digitally enabled and e-commerce channels growing significantly faster than its core warehouses, supported by high membership renewal and strong gasoline volumes. At the same time, investors and analysts are increasingly focused on whether Costco’s premium valuation can be justified amid sticky inflation, cautious central bank policy, and early signs of membership renewal softness. We’ll now examine...
